content: Hey, I’m Abhishek — a Staff Software Engineer focused on infrastructure, distributed systems, and the engineering craft that keeps large-scale systems running reliably. I started this blog to write about things I find genuinely interesting. What you’ll find here Deep dives into distributed systems concepts. Infrastructure engineering — Kubernetes, service meshes, platform tooling. Engineering practices around reliability and scalability. Occasionally, opinions on how software teams work best. Background I’ve spent my career building and operating systems at scale — working across compute infrastructure, data platforms, and developer tooling. I’m particularly interested in the gap between how distributed systems are described in papers and how they actually behave in production. Get in touch GitHub: abhics1002 LinkedIn: abbharadwaj Email: svits.abhishek@gmail.com
